name: Dynagas LNG Partners LP 9.00% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Units
summary: Dynagas LNG Partners LP 9.00% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Units are preferred equity units of a master limited partnership (MLP) focused on owning and operating LNG carriers. The units pay a fixed cumulative dividend and have liquidation preference over common units, representing a claim on the partnership's assets. Dynagas LNG Partners transports liquefied natural gas worldwide.
